fields.name: containerTitle
fields.label: Journal/book/etc.
fields.description: Title of the journal, book, encyclopedia, newspaper, etc. in which this work was published

filename.description: The filename field is used internally by the content management system and is visible only to you, not to visitors. I suggest a format like "beautiful-mystery", "living-in-the-stone-age", etc.

defaultItem.review: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

filename.description: The filename field is used internally by the content management system and is visible only to you, not to visitors.

defaultItem.title: Example Event Title: Themes and Topics
defaultItem.description: A brief description of the event, outlining its focus, participants, and broader significance.

fields.name: href
fields.label: External link (optional)
fields.description: Use this field to provide an external link to, e.g., a description of the event on the hosting institution's website

fields.name: publicWork
fields.label: Linked Public Writing or Media (optional)
fields.description: If this event has an associated Public Writings & Media entry, link the associated work here (e.g. for interviews, radio appearances, etc.).

fields.name: type
fields.label: The type of work
fields.description: E.g. "Interview", "Essay", "Podcast", etc.

fields.name: body
fields.label: Body text
fields.description: Use this field for the work's main content

fields.name: event
fields.label: Linked event (optional)
fields.description: If this work has an associated Events entry with date/time/venue and related logistical information, link the Event here (e.g. for interviews, radio appearances, etc.).
